name: Bottle Flip Game
description: Bottle Flip 3D is an addictive arcade game that puts your skills to the test. Your goal is to flip a plastic bottle and make it land on various objects without falling. Sounds easy, right? Well, think again! You’ll need to tap the screen at the right moment to make the bottle jump, flip, and bounce through a series of rooms filled with obstacles. Shelves, tables, chairs, sofas, and even subwoofers — youll have to use everything as a platform for your bottle. But be careful; some objects are more tricky than others!
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
